ASSET.notes: Rows 1-4 are metadata (company name, empty, reporter, record count). Scan each row until a cell matching 'NOME DO ATIVO' is found (case-insensitive). The key column is 'Nome do ativo'.

UEM.notes: BOM-prefixed UTF-8 file. First row is the header. 'Friendly Name' is used as hostname (fallback: 'Hostname'). 'DM Last Seen' is the management last seen — different from 'Last Seen'.

AD.notes: BOM-prefixed UTF-8 file. First row is the header. WARNING: 'Last Logon Time' and 'Password Last Set' referenced by dashboard_fixed.ts may NOT be present in the current export. This is a non-blocking WARN.

EDR.notes: Standard UTF-8 file. First row is the header. 'Hostname' is the machine key. 'Sensor Tags' contains PA group info.
